summary: Solomon AI v3.0 Module Testing Complete - ALL FEATURES VERIFIED. Module 2 Kids QR codes, Module 5 Events hero/categories, Module 6 Small Groups attendance endpoints, Module 8 Global typography. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified.

events_category_tabs.details: All 7 categories present: All Events, Worship, Women, Men, Youth, Community, Conferences

events_share_button.details: Share button visible in hero banner, uses navigator.share or clipboard fallback

small_groups_attendance_post.details: Records attendance session with attendees list, returns record ID

small_groups_at_risk_get.details: Returns members who missed 3+ consecutive sessions with threshold=3
